title: dactylorhiza umbrosa
intro: Dactylorhiza umbrosa, also known as the shaded marsh orchid, is a species of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza umbrosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stomach ulcers, and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, it is often used in tinctures, infusions, and dried root extracts, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
